name: ClawShield Local
description: Local-first trust layer for OpenClaw with inbound risk scoring, transcript hygiene, and skill inspection.

mode.label: Runtime Mode
mode.help: observe adds guidance, enforce blocks risky tool calls, quiet minimizes prompt friction

warnThreshold.label: Warn Threshold
warnThreshold.help: Score that begins operator-visible caution behavior

holdThreshold.label: Hold Threshold
holdThreshold.help: Score that blocks dangerous tools in enforce mode

throttleWindowMs.label: Throttle Window
throttleWindowMs.help: Suppress duplicate warnings for the same conversation within this window
